finding_results.notes: Rebuilt the aftermath and close around Gavin's observable choices: he calculates lost work time, wants the manuscript, does not go to Duncan, and resumes worrying at the passage in bed. The abstract moral adjudication is cut back to one brief self-diagnostic beat in each targeted section.
finding_results.summary: Gavin's skewed priorities now land through behavior and omission instead of repeated explanation.

finding_results.notes: Aligned the manuscript's hiding place with the continuity sheet by moving it into Gavin's trunk before the summons and keeping every later reference consistent with that location.
finding_results.summary: The manuscript no longer relocates without an on-page action.

finding_results.notes: Replaced the forbidden sentence/grammar calibration phrasing with a fresh Gavin-style failed explanation built from self-correction, hedging, and ordinary physical language.
finding_results.summary: Gavin's substrate explanation now sounds like pressured speech rather than imported calibration text.

finding_results.notes: Removed the sample-line architecture from Gavin's spoken explanations and his immediate post-argument rehearsal while preserving his halting, inadequate attempts to make Miren understand.
finding_results.summary: The scene keeps Gavin's communicative failure under pressure without echoing the style-bible exemplar.

summary: Chapter 6 was revised in place to fix the manuscript-location continuity break, replace calibration-derived substrate dialogue with fresh Gavin-voice language, and recast the aftermath and close so Gavin's alien priorities are shown through concrete behavior and neglected obligations.
